name: Velveeta Salsa Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Velveeta Cheese spread, cubed (can use light)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place brick of Velveeta and jar of Picante sauce in a slow cooker or crock pot, and turn on high. Stir occasionally until melted and blended.
2. Stir in cilantro when melted.
3. Serve with tortilla chips.
Note: You can substitute two cans of chopped tomatoes and chiles for the salsa, or add one can of tomatoes and chiles. Play around with this, and you might even add a little Louisiana hot sauce!
